articles.title: Riven Tides - Patch Notes 1.26.0 - ARC Raiders
articles.description: ARC Raiders is a multiplayer extraction adventure, set in a lethal future earth, ravaged by a mysterious mechanized threat known as ARC.

articles.title: Microsoft Office can now be controlled with Logitech’s MX Creative Console - The Verge
articles.description: Logitech’s new Productivity Plugins make common shortcuts and tools in Slack, Office, and Notion accessible through its MX accessories.

articles.title: Replit's CEO says it's dumb to study computer science thinking you can make a 'boatload' at Google - Business Insider
articles.description: Amjad Masad said that young people who are not deeply interested in computer science should not study it.

articles.title: Axios Finish Line: Prompt like a pro - Axios
articles.description: Anyone can prompt AI with greater sophistication and confidence and get greater results.

articles.title: Put it in pencil: NASA's Artemis III mission will launch no earlier than late 2027 - Ars Technica
articles.description: SpaceX and Blue Origin tell NASA their lunar landers will be ready for Artemis III in late 2027.

articles.title: Google is testing AI chatbot search for YouTube - The Verge
articles.description: Google is trying out an AI Mode-like search called “Ask YouTube” that builds a result page with videos, Shorts, and text.
